properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I seek walk of the mountains his Father by his side Never realizing he would be the sacrifice And when Abraham raise His hand to take His child's life In His heart he must have wondered why?

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Sometimes God will take as through unexpected places but in every situation, we will find

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: God will provide Beyond what we imagine So much more than we could fathom He will supply, God will provide When we trust in Him completely And take it step believing as a child God will provide

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: On another hill called Calvary Our fathers only Son was offered as a price Was gift of faithfulness and love Amides the cry of all mankind God reach down from above and covered as with Christ atoning blood

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: No matter what your needed Is God will always meet us I know his grace will always be enough

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: God will provide… He will provide… I know my God will provide
